subject: Chitonga
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Basicikolo basale abumwi bupanduluzi mbobayeeya kuti tabuzulide, bamana balembe twaambo
topics: MUTWE MUSYOONTO 3: Kubamba bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca.
NTALISYO: Ciindi basicikolo nibamana kusalangunya akulanganya bupanduluzi bwaandeene –andeene,
balajana luzyibo lujatikizya mizeezo iizwa mubupanduluzi oobu. Aboobo mucibeela eeci tulalanganya nzila
zyakubamba bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca kuzwa kuli sicikolo omwe-omwe kweendelanya ambwaacimvwa
